ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nominations" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nomination */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the nomination */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor nominated */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film the actor appeared in */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award category */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the nomination won the award */,
  "ceremony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award ceremony */,
  "nominated_by" TEXT /* Who nominated the actor or film */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the nomination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the nomination was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the nomination was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_ceremony_id FOREIGN KEY ("ceremony_id") REFERENCES award_ceremonies ("ceremony_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the actor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "film_title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the film */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer of the film */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the film */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the film */,
  "box_office" TEXT /* Box office revenue of the film */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Synopsis of the film */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the film record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the film record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award category */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award category */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Acting, Directing) */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and criteria for the award */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_ceremonies" (
  "ceremony_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award ceremony */,
  "ceremony_name" TEXT /* Name of the award ceremony */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the award ceremony */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the award ceremony */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the award ceremony */,
  "host" TEXT /* Host of the award ceremony */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the award ceremony */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* Sponsors of the award ceremony */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award ceremony record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award ceremony record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ceremony_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the director */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the director record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the director record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the producer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the producer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the producer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the producer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the producer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the producer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the producer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nomination being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the nomination */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the nomination was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_nomination_id FOREIGN KEY ("nomination_id") REFERENCES nominations ("nomination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_ceremony_nominations" (
  "ceremony_nomination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ceremony-nomination link */,
  "ceremony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award ceremony */,
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nomination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ceremony-nomination link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ceremony-nomination link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ceremony_nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_ceremony_nominations_ceremony_id FOREIGN KEY ("ceremony_id") REFERENCES award_ceremonies ("ceremony_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_ceremony_nominations_nomination_id FOREIGN KEY ("nomination_id") REFERENCES nominations ("nomination_id")
)
